title: How to use Monday
excerpt:
Hi, I’m new here. 
I was interested in Monday, I see that it’s very convenient for teamwork. But is it possible to use Monday for myself to control my tasks and their fulfillment?

posts.author: Harper (Harper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m new here.
I was interested in Monday, I see that it’s very convenient for teamwork. But is it possible to use Monday for myself to control my tasks and their fulfillment?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Harper - it absolutely is possible!

Had you looked into using our Free, Individual Plan? This plan was curated for solo users and smaller teams! Whilst it does have limited features and thus would depend on how advanced you’d need the features to be, I would recommend looking into this plan to get started

Feel free to reach out if you have specific questions

posts.author: Harper (Harper)
posts.cookedHtml:
BiancaT:

Had you looked into using our Free, Individual Plan? This plan was curated for solo users and smaller teams! Whilst it does have limited features and thus would depend on how advanced you’d need the features to be, I would recommend looking into this plan to get started

Thank you for your reply, that’s what I was looking for!
